required_preferences.fact: Returns to silencing phone notifications in the evening, trusting her sister to handle urgent calls regarding their mother's health while she's home

supersedes.fact: Keeps her phone unmuted all day for urgent calls about her mother’s health — pauses notification silencing until her mother’s recovery stabilizes

required_preferences.fact: Relies on daily video or phone check-ins with her mother while abroad, delegating in-person visits to her sisters

supersedes.fact: Makes daily check-in visits to her mother’s home before starting work — never skips a day unless traveling

required_preferences.fact: Regularly connects with faculty from other departments over coffee after planning meetings to foster interdisciplinary relationships
Prioritizes weekly community partnership meetings during the first months of the grant rollout — automatically reschedules less critical internal team catch-ups to accommodate these
Hosts Sunday family dinners each week — screens all personal calls during this time
Participates in cultural outings organized by her host university, preferring group excursions to solo sightseeing while abroad

persona: A mid-career sociologist with multiple published journal articles
